observed_failure.surface: SourceGuard replaying a current full TestMesh parent from a deeply nested persistent owner-evidence root on Windows
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: a current parent aggregation can be replayed and projected read-only from the exact persistent evidence authority that produced it
observed_failure.observed_result: the parent file existed, matched the emitted reference, and remained valid, but direct Path.read_bytes raised an OS error beyond the legacy Windows path budget and was reported as aggregation_unreadable

classification.owner: SkillGuard TestMesh read-only aggregation replay and OpenSpec projection
classification.error_signature: aggregation_unreadable for an existing hash-bound parent below a path longer than 260 characters

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: portable evidence writes already used the platform-aware physical path converter, but TestMesh replay and projection retained several direct physical reads
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the external-target model had replayed the emitted parent from the real nested owner-evidence root instead of a short temporary root
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: every physical TestMesh read must use the same platform-aware path conversion as immutable writes while portable wire paths stay canonical and relative
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: test_mesh replay/project/manifest/source reads -> execution_records.filesystem_path -> exact existing file bytes

generalized_repair.rule: Normalize physical paths for registry, prompt, manifest, aggregation, and projection-source reads without changing receipt identities, wire references, execution ownership, or evidence meaning.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: a parent aggregation beyond 260 characters now replays and projects to OpenSpec with execution_count zero
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: the Windows regression executes aggregation replay and projection from the long owner-evidence authority and checks the unchanged zero-execution boundary
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the repair adds no alias evidence root, fallback reader, optional mode, new receipt shape, or second authority

required_revalidation: focused TestMesh long-path replay and projection regressions
transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed parity
real SourceGuard parent aggregation replay and OpenSpec projection

revalidation_evidence.focused_regression: 24 passed in the focused TestMesh module, including real Windows path length above 260 characters
revalidation_evidence.real_sourceguard_projection: SourceGuard aggregation sha256:5491453da0ecb16a4495b316a0f954cd5b275054f36b96b4eed21dbf067e593a replayed and projected with execution_count 0; OpenSpec receipt sha256:21339550594723aad4b456fc836bebab30df1e7b11ebdd6b25f640bcfe6d9a06 verified

claim_boundary: The current source, transactional installed projection, real long-path SourceGuard aggregation, and receipt-only OpenSpec consumer all passed. This closes the physical path class without claiming unrelated target behavior.
